title: Pledge Clean It Multisurface Polish Cleaner Classic 250ml (Pack of 2)
features: The information below applies to each unit in the pack
Pledge Clean It Multisurface Polish Cleaner Classic – the furniture spray that reduces allergens from dust and enhances sealed hard surfaces
Pledge Clean It Multisurface Polish Cleaner Classic (leather, furniture, wood and dust cleaner) makes your home less sneezy and more comfortable
Thanks to its fresh, cleansing formula, this Pledge cleaner removes dust, allergens in dust and pet dander while providing shine and protection for your hard surfaces
The Pledge multisurface cleaner that's ideal on Granite (Sealed), Laminate Non Floors, Marble (Sealed), Plastic, Stainless Steel and Wood (Sealed)
description: Ingredients Contains <5% Non-Ionic Surfactants, 5-15% Aliphatic Hydrocarbons, Perfume, Butylphenyl Methylpropional, 4-(4-Hydroxy-4-Methylpentyl) Cyclohex-3-Enecarbaldehyde, Hexyl Cinnamal, 2-Bromo-2-Nitropropane-1,3-Diol Directions How to Use: For best results, Spray onto cloth or hold can upright 6-8 Inch from surface to be cleaned. Safe for all finished, sealed surfaces. Where to Use: Granite (sealed), laminate non floors, marble (sealed), plastic, stainless steel and wood (sealed). Safety Warning Warning Pressurised container: May burst if heated. Keep out of reach of children. Protect from sunlight. Do not expose to temperatures exceeding 50°C. Keep away from heat, hot surfaces, sparks, open flames and other ignition sources. No smoking. Do not pierce or burn, even after use. Wash hands thoroughly after handling. Do not breathe spray. Use only in well-ventilated areas. As with any household product avoid prolonged skin contact with this product. 10% by mass of contents are flammable. Solvent Abuse Can Kill Instantly See more
